_documentation.purpose: Reference payload for the DB-driven sidebar navigation of the ecommerce storefront admin. The sidebar is seeded from Module rows, NOT frontend code. Create these at runtime via the /settings/modules admin UI or POST /api/Module/bulk.
_documentation.manual_step: The Settings -> Ecommerce entry (below, in `settingsChild`) is a type:2 child of the EXISTING Settings module. Its parentId differs per database, so it cannot be pre-seeded with a static id. Resolve the Settings module id first (GET /api/Module or the /settings/modules list), set it as parentId, then create the child.
_documentation.related: Store-config settings (name/hero/delivery fee) are NOT nav rows; they auto-render under Settings -> Features -> Ecommerce via the [SettingsModule("Ecommerce")] declaration.

settingsChild._note: Create separately once the Settings module id is known; set parentId to it.
settingsChild.title: Ecommerce
settingsChild.parentId: <resolve the existing Settings module id at runtime>
